summary: Large stage decomp PR for Onett and Mute City. It replaces many placeholder functions with C implementations, expands stage-specific GroundVars and helper structs, updates several prototypes and includes, and changes grLib_801C9808 to return the HSD_Generator produced by hsd_8039EFAC. No PR body or review comments were present in the slice.

key_files.role: Main Mute City implementation; adds includes, local command/track structs, initialization, command dispatch, spline/car track logic, and several previously placeholder grMuteCity functions.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMuteCity_801EFDF8, grMuteCity_801F0290, grMuteCity_801F04B8, grMuteCity_801F094C, grMuteCity_801F0D20, grMuteCity_801F0F4C, grMuteCity_801F106C, grMuteCity_801F1328, grMuteCity_801F1A34, grMuteCity_801F290C implemented

key_files.role: Main Onett implementation; expands callbacks/stage data, implements awnings, cars, building state logic, item/material interactions, and generator timing.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett_801E3A34, grOnett_801E3DA0, grOnett_801E41C8, grOnett_801E43E0, grOnett_801E5030, grOnett_801E5194, grOnett_801E5214, grOnett_801E5538 implemented

key_files.role: Ground type recovery for Mute City and Onett; adds typed fields for HSD_GObj, HSD_JObj, HSD_LObj, CmSubject, HSD_Generator, Item_GObj, GXColor, Onett awning/building/car vars, and Mute City camera/blast-zone fields.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMuteCity_GroundVars, grMuteCity_GroundVars2, grOnett_AwningData, grOnett_GroundVars, grOnett_Building_GroundVars, grOnett_Car_GroundVars updated

key_files.role: Replaces a huge monolithic float-field Mute City car-storage struct with a compact typed grMc_CarEntry array of 30 entries.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMc_8049F4B8_t removed; grMc_CarEntry typedef, STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(grMc_CarEntry) == 0x2C), and grMc_8049F4B8[30] added

key_files.role: Updates grLib_801C9808 body to return the HSD_Generator from hsd_8039EFAC.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grLib_801C9808 changed from void to HSD_Generator* and returns hsd_8039EFAC

key_files.role: Header prototype synchronized with grLib_801C9808 return type.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grLib_801C9808 prototype changed from void to HSD_Generator*

key_files.role: Header prototypes updated for recovered Onett function signatures and item forward declaration.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: adds it/forward.h; replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for grOnett_801E5030, grOnett_801E5194, grOnett_801E5214

key_files.role: Header touched for Mute City signature/prototype surface.

what_changed.text: Mute City placeholders were replaced with implementations covering stage init, animation/command dispatch, spline wrapping, track collision line updates, car entry initialization and update helpers, and material/light interactions.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grmutecity.c placeholder markers removed for multiple grMuteCity functions
diff.diff: grMc_CmdEntry, grMc_TrackInitData, grMc_SplineEvalWrapped, grMc_CarEntry introduced

what_changed.text: Onett placeholders were replaced with implementations for stage callbacks, awning physics, building damage/state transitions, traffic car state machines, car/item callbacks, SFX lookup, and generator spawning.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gronett.c placeholder markers removed for multiple grOnett functions
diff.diff: StageCallbacks expanded from 2 to 6 entries and StageData grOt_803E2858 added

what_changed.text: GroundVars were made more specific for these stages: Onett gained separate awning, building, and car var structs; Mute City fields were typed as HSD_GObj/HSD_JObj/HSD_LObj/Vec3/f32 instead of broad padding or u32 placeholders.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: types.h updates around grMuteCity_GroundVars and Onett structs

what_changed.text: Prototype surfaces were updated where implementation evidence recovered signatures, including grLib_801C9808 returning HSD_Generator* and Onett functions replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gronett.h grOnett_801E5030, grOnett_801E5194, grOnett_801E5214 signatures

smart_moves.text: Converted a single massive generated-looking Mute City car data block into a small typed car-entry struct plus a 30-element array, matching the looped initialization pattern in grMuteCity_801F0F4C.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMuteCity_801F0F4C loops i < 30 over grMc_803E3B7C and grMc_8049F4B8

smart_moves.text: Recovered Onett stage-specific union arms instead of reusing unrelated GroundVars: building code moved from kongo3/unk fields to onett_building, and car code uses onettcar fields.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett_801E3CE4 changes gp->gv.kongo3/gp->gv.unk to gp->gv.onett_building
diff.diff: types.h adds grOnett_Building_GroundVars and grOnett_Car_GroundVars

smart_moves.text: Introduced small local helper inlines for repeated logic: Mute City spline wrap evaluation and Onett SFX table lookup.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated stage state is clearly indexed, recover the array shape instead of preserving a long flat generated struct.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMc_8049F4B8 changed from one 0x528 struct to grMc_CarEntry[30]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Stage-specific GroundVars can be split by gobj role when callbacks and code paths show distinct state ownership.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett_GroundVars labeled Traffic/awning gobj ID 5

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function bodies should drive header signature cleanup rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grlib.h synchronized with grlib.c return type

naming_conventions.text: Address-style function names were preserved for unrecovered semantic names, while local variables used short role names such as gp, jobj, lobj, entry, src, dst, idx, car, and awn.
Semantic struct names were introduced when usage made the role clearer: grMc_CmdEntry, grMc_TrackInitData, grMc_CarEntry, grOnett_AwningData, grOnett_Building_GroundVars, and grOnett_Car_GroundVars.
Partially understood fields kept x-offset-style names such as x24, x28, xD0_flags, x108, and x110 instead of inventing unsupported semantics.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett_StageParam keeps several xNN fields
diff.diff: grMuteCity_GroundVars keeps xNN field names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK appears in several recovered functions, suggesting narrow stack-shape steering was used in this PR slice.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No build, objdiff, or regression ledger was included in the PR slice, so this is observed tactic use only, not validated justification.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Switch-based command and state machines were used for stage script commands and object behavior rather than preserving branch ladders.
Natural loops were used for repeated state initialization/update: Onett awnings loop over two entries, Mute City cars loop over thirty entries, and entity iteration walks fighter lists.
Header helper/accessor use appears in recovered source, including GET_GROUND, GET_JOBJ, HSD_JObjSet*/Get*, HSD_ASSERT, OSReport, ABS, and M_PI.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett_801E37F4 changes user_data access to GET_GROUND
diff.diff: grMuteCity_801EFDF8 uses OSReport and HSD_ASSERT

follow_up_queries: Onett building state onett_building kongo3 unk migration

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2391 merged, no issue comments, no review comments, no reviews
raw/diff.diff: 88786-byte diff; loaded excerpt truncated but targeted local reads covered key Onett, Mute City, and types.h regions
notes: The diff strongly supports changed files, recovered functions, type/header edits, and observed tactics.
There is no PR body, review discussion, or validation output in the slice; do not infer reviewer intent, match status, or objdiff/build results.
Some large grmutecity.c regions remain summarized from function names and visible snippets rather than exhaustively inspected line-by-line.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover indexed stage state as arrays when loop shape is evident
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2391 supports a reusable lesson: a large flat generated-looking stage data struct can often be replaced by a small typed entry plus an array when initialization/update code naturally iterates a fixed count, as with grMc_CarEntry[30] and grMuteCity_801F0F4C.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grMuteCity_801F0F4C for loop over 30 entries

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split stage GroundVars by gobj role when code paths prove ownership
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2391 supports a reusable lesson: for multi-object stages, separate union arms can improve accuracy when callbacks and state machines show distinct ownership, as Onett split awning, building, and car GroundVars.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grOnett building code moved from kongo3/unk to onett_building

source_update_candidates.title: Onett stage state is split into traffic/awning, building, and car GroundVars
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2391 adds separate Onett GroundVars structs in src/melee/gr/types.h: grOnett_GroundVars for traffic/awning gobj ID 5, grOnett_Building_GroundVars for building gobj ID 4, and grOnett_Car_GroundVars for car gobj ID 3.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: types.h comments and struct additions for Onett
diff.diff: gronett.c uses gp->gv.onett, gp->gv.onett_building, gp->gv.onettcar
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-specific type ownership fact for future Onett decomp work; should be curated as a source/path fact, not a global standard.

source_update_candidates.title: grLib_801C9808 returns HSD_Generator*
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2391 changes grLib_801C9808 from void to HSD_Generator* in both grlib.c and grlib.h and returns hsd_8039EFAC(0, arg1, arg0, arg2).
source_update_candidates.reason: Concrete recovered prototype fact that affects stage generator callers such as Onett.

source_update_candidates.title: Mute City car storage uses grMc_CarEntry[30]
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2391 replaces the previous large grMc_8049F4B8_t static object with grMc_CarEntry, STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(grMc_CarEntry) == 0x2C), and static grMc_CarEntry grMc_8049F4B8[30].
evidence_refs: diff.diff: grmutecity.static.h car entry typedef and array
source_update_candidates.reason: Path-specific data layout fact for future Mute City car logic work.
